finding: Pre-onset news changed 1 of 8 combined verdicts. Derivatives-only explained 7; news-only explained 7; 6 overlapped, 1 was derivatives-only, 1 was news-only, and 0 was unexplained by either. This LUNA sample shows evidence overlap; it does not establish general source superiority.
limitations: Ragas Faithfulness evaluates rationale support, not whether the verdict is correct.
One eight-episode LUNA case study does not prove causality or source superiority.
